steps.title: Identify the researchers' challenge to current classifications
steps.content: The researchers point out that climate change shifts species ranges and creates new habitats. This fundamentally undermines the stability of the current invasive/native distinction.

steps.title: Apply the researchers' challenge to the choices
steps.content: The observations about climate-driven range shifts directly imply that current classifications require reevaluation—the conclusion B states. A addresses Colorado's past (irrelevant to the researchers' point), C reinforces the invasive/native distinction that the researchers challenge, and D arbitrarily limits the problem to one species rather than the broader framework. That matches choice B — B is correct.
